unbalanced_entry.title: Unbalanced journal entry
unbalanced_entry.detail: The sum of debits does not equal the sum of credits.

mixed_currency.title: Mixed currencies in one entry
mixed_currency.detail: A journal entry must use a single currency in v1.

missing_required_dimension.title: Missing required dimension
missing_required_dimension.detail: A line omits a dimension its account requires.

unknown_account_code.title: Unknown account code
unknown_account_code.detail: A line references an account code that does not exist.

invalid_cursor.title: Invalid cursor
invalid_cursor.detail: The pagination cursor is malformed or expired.

concurrency_conflict.title: Concurrency conflict
concurrency_conflict.detail: The entry was modified by someone else; reload and retry.

duplicate_idempotency_key.title: Duplicate idempotency key
duplicate_idempotency_key.detail: This Idempotency-Key was already used with a different request body.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.detail: A valid bearer token is required.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.detail: You may not act on this resource.

not_found.title: Not found
not_found.detail: The requested resource does not exist.

validation_failed.title: Validation failed
validation_failed.detail: The request is syntactically or semantically invalid.
